mapper.select:
SELECT CM."MESSAGE_NUM", CM."CLUB_NUM", CM."SENDER_NUM", CM."MESSAGE_CONTENTS", CM."MESSAGE_TYPE", CM."IMAGE_URL",
C."CLUB_NAME" AS "CLUB_NAME", M."MEMBER_NAME" AS "SENDER_NAME",
TO_CHAR( CM."CREATE_DATE" AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI' ) AS "CHAT_TIME"
FROM "TB_CLUB_MESSAGE" CM
LEFT JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CM."SENDER_NUM" = M."MEMBER_NUM"
LEFT JOIN "TB_CLUB" C ON CM."CLUB_NUM" = C."CLUB_NUM"
WHERE CM."CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum}
ORDER BY CM."MESSAGE_NUM" ASC
